section.num: § 23.11 So in original. No section 22 has been enacted.
section.heading: Court of the United States defined

content.p: As used in this title, except where otherwise expressly provided 22 So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma. the term “court of the United States” includes the District Court of Guam, the District Court for the Northern Mariana Islands, and the District Court of the Virgin Islands.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 103–322, title XXXII, § 320914(a), Sept. 13, 1994, 108 Stat. 2128.)
